# Protein Mining Results

This repository stores encrypted protein molecule submissions from the 8-GPU miner.

## About

- Network: Bittensor Subnet 68
- Purpose: Store verifiable molecule submissions
- Format: Encrypted text files

## Files

Each file represents a submission:
- Filename: Unique submission hash
- Content: Base64 encoded encrypted submission data
- Format: `{hash}.txt`

## Miner Information

- Running on: 8x NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 SUPER GPUs
- Model: TREAT2
- Molecule Generation: combinatorial_db (RXN3, RXN5)
